attempt_summary: Normalized actual outputs from artifact files.

rubric_item_scores.failure_mode: Missing required artifacts (acceptance_checks.json, output_schema.json) and inability to open/inspect spreadsheet; acceptance checks not executable/visible.
rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: Provide the two missing artifacts (acceptance_checks.json and output_schema.json). Ensure acceptance_checks.json is machine-executable and include a minimal runnable harness or plain JSON-check logic. Produce a spreadsheet export or a parseable workbook (or include an additional CSV or formula-dump) so formulas are inspectable without environment-specific libraries. In the memo, add explicit pointers to workbook cell addresses for each computed value and attach a short log showing acceptance_checks.json execution results.
rubric_item_scores.notes: The expert memo (preview) documents row-level inputs (R1-R3), explicit formulas, row-level citations, needs_review flags, budget values, and a recommendation (O2). This satisfies many reproducibility requirements. However two required artifacts (acceptance_checks.json and output_schema.json) are not present in the normalized actual outputs (deliverable_mismatches list in deterministic precheck). The spreadsheet could not be programmatically inspected here because the xlsx preview failed to open (openpyxl unavailable), so assertions about visible formulas in SBOM_risk_4.xlsx rely on the worker trace and memo claims rather than direct workbook inspection. Acceptance checks are missing/unavailable for execution so machine-verifiable checks are not demonstrably present. The submission marks several ambiguous items as needs_review (good), documents assumptions (including normalization of CVSS values), and includes sensitivity notes. Missing artifacts and the inability to verify workbook formulas and executable acceptance checks reduce the score substantially under the rubric's partial-credit rules.

attempt_summary: Attempt failed or did not produce a valid agent trace; raw logs were preserved.

rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: Re-run the attempt ensuring the agent can complete execution (resolve provider quota/usage limits). Produce all required artifacts: SBOM_risk_4.xlsx with visible formulas and row-level citations, expert_memo.md documenting methodology and assumptions, output_schema.json, and acceptance_checks.json. Include agent_trace.json and actual_outputs.json. If any inputs are ambiguous or intentionally exceeded budget, mark them with needs_review and document justification in expert_memo.md.
rubric_item_scores.notes: Required deliverable artifacts (SBOM_risk_4.xlsx, expert_memo.md, output_schema.json, acceptance_checks.json) were not produced. Logs indicate the agent hit a provider usage limit and did not write the required agent_trace.json or the deliverable files. Without the artifacts, reproducibility, visible formulas, row-level citations, and executable acceptance checks cannot be validated.
